queries.query: Set up a reflection log for tracking agent failures in this repo.
We've been recording agent failures and have a few patterns now — promote them into rules.
Find any sub-surfaces with 3+ entries and propose a rule that closes the gap.
Score our repo against Level 4 / Level 5 of the Engineering Agents maturity rubric.
Are we at Sovereign Engineering level yet?
Help me set up the feedback loop so agent failures become AGENTS.md rules.
Add a new entry to our reflection log.
We have 5 failures in the reflection log about gates — what rule should we add?
Write the W1 ≥3 promotion floor into our process.
Write a SQL migration to add a users table.
Help me debug this failing test in Python.
Set up an AGENTS.md for my repo.
Make my repo work well with Claude Code.
